details.effect: Ward. (This follower can be engaged when it's put onto your field or during your end phase. When followers with Ward are engaged, your opponent can only attack them.) [fanfare] Select an Umamusume follower or Umamusume amulet that costs 4 play points or less in your cemetery and put it onto your field.
[act][engage]: Select an Umamusume follower on your field and give it [attack]+1. If it's a racing follower, give it [attack]+2 instead.
[act][engage]: Select an Umamusume follower on your field and give it [defense]+1. If it's a racing follower, give it [defense]+2 instead.
